name: Peanut Butter/Chocolate Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter in a pan over medium heat until smooth.
2. Add the melted butter, peanut butter, and vanilla to the melted mixture. Stir until well combined.
3. In a large bowl, combine the sugar and cocoa. Pour the melted butter mixture into the bowl with the dry ingredients.
4. Mix the ingredients together using a wooden spoon until the mixture is creamy and smooth.
5. Knead the dough with your hands until it becomes uniform and well combined.
6. Spoon the fudge batter into a cake pan lined with parchment paper.
7. Refrigerate for at least 2 hours, or until firm before cutting into squares.
